name: litellm-action
description: GitHub Action to run LiteLLM proxy server

scripts.build: pnpm run build:prep && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:post
scripts.build:main: ncc build lib/main.js -o dist/main --source-map --license licenses.txt && node scripts/prepend-license.js dist/main/licenses.txt
scripts.build:post: ncc build lib/post.js -o dist/post --source-map --license licenses.txt && node scripts/prepend-license.js dist/post/licenses.txt
scripts.all: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run audit:fix && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
